shared_case_surface: bounded authority-sensitive cases that keep authority signal, expected classification, observed classification, bounded fallback move, and failure-versus-readout distinctions inspectable on the same approval-boundary surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same approval-boundary question, keeps the authority signal and resulting classification jointly inspectable, and still covers clearly safe action, clearly approval-gated action, clearly out-of-bounds action, ambiguous authority, and softened-risk wording with a bounded safer alternative without collapsing safe proceed, approval required, and out-of-bounds into one generic safety read.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the visible authority signal directly
safe proceed, approval required, and out-of-bounds remain distinct classifications
bounded fallback moves remain visible when they are the safer path
the public readout stays weaker than the authority-boundary evidence
